text:
----- Forwarded message from Garrett Cooper <yanefbsd@gmail.com> -----

Subject: Re: kern/144659: [pcm] The distortion of the sound playback of music 
	at high volume levels.
From: Garrett Cooper <yanefbsd@gmail.com>

This problem description is incredibly vague.

1. How are you reproducing the issue?
2. What kind of distortion are you hearing?
3. Can you please provide the file or method of reproducing the sound?
4. What's your volume?

Thanks,
-Garrett

----- End forwarded message -----
